title: Discover the Ledger command contract
description: Expose self-documenting human help and versioned machine-readable schemas for every public Ledger operation. Implements G5 and UC-LEDGER-006.
rationale: AI agents need to discover capabilities and validation rules without private database knowledge or undocumented prompts.
story_want: agents to inspect every Ledger operation before invoking it
acceptance_criteria: Given the self-contained executable, when an agent requests top-level or Ledger help non-interactively, then available public operations, required inputs, output modes, and examples are returned without starting a daemon or mutation.

Given any public Ledger operation, when its machine schema is requested, then the Ledger returns a versioned schema describing request fields, result shape, expected module-scoped errors, and exit codes.
Given a schema request, when it is repeated for the same contract version, then its semantic content is deterministic.
Given an operation not in the public contract, when it is requested, then the Ledger returns a stable unknown-operation error and no internal storage detail.
